overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark underground bunker or industrial facility with green fluorescent lighting. The player moves through concrete corridors and rooms containing medical equipment, storage shelves, and other characters, creating a tense atmospheric experience typical of tactical or horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete corridor with overhead fluorescent lighting

events.description: approaching and entering a larger room with visible medical equipment

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through a dark corridor toward a lit area ahead

entered.detail: greenish fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling
rough concrete block walls lining the corridor
metal storage shelves with various items

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark narrow corridor with green fluorescent lighting overhead. The camera moves forward through the concrete passageway, passing metal shelving units on the left side, approaching a brighter area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay with examination table and equipment

events.description: slowing pace to circle around the central examination table and observe the room

agents.ego_description: circling around the room examining the medical mannequin and equipment

notable_agents.action: medical mannequin or figure in white standing motionless by the examination table

entered.detail: long metal examination table in the center of the room
glowing screens and medical monitoring equipment
support pillar in the middle of the room

segments.scene_description: Entering a medical bay, the camera circles around a central examination table where a white medical mannequin stands motionless. The room features concrete pillars, glowing medical monitors, and overhead fluorescent lighting as the player explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with metal shelving units

events.description: moving into darker area with reduced lighting as the corridor narrows

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark storage areas with shelves on both sides

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units filled with boxes and supplies
cardboard boxes and containers stacked on shelves
wooden workbench with tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: Leaving the medical bay, the scene transitions to a darker storage corridor with metal shelving units lining the walls. The lighting becomes dimmer as the camera moves past storage boxes and a workbench.

scene_state.functional_zone: locker room corridor with equipment storage

events.description: encountering seated characters in the corridor ahead
approaching wall with hanging tactical vests and equipment

agents.ego_description: moving through the corridor past other characters toward the equipment storage area

notable_agents.action: character sitting on a plastic chair against the wall
standing character near the equipment lockers

entered.detail: plastic chairs lined against the corridor wall
tactical vests and gear hanging on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a wider corridor where characters are seated against the walls. The camera approaches an equipment storage area with lockers and tactical vests hanging on the far wall, passing by a standing character near the equipment racks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial facility that shifts from narrow corridors into a medical bay and finally toward a tactical staging area. It begins in a dark, narrow concrete passageway under green fluorescent lighting, moving past metal shelving units toward a brighter opening. As the camera enters a medical bay, the scene opens up to circle a motionless white mannequin on an examination table surrounded by glowing monitors and concrete pillars. The view then transitions back into a dimmer storage corridor lined with boxes and a workbench before expanding into a wider hallway. Finally, the camera glides past characters seated against the walls toward an equipment storage area featuring lockers and hanging tactical vests.
